reviews.review_text: What an excellent experienced!!! The place was comfy, child's friendly, and of course, just sitting right beside the Burrill lake.
Awesome small park. Walking distance to cafes,bakery,IGA,bottle shop & Burrill Beach & Lake.
Didn't mark on service as I don't need that service as I stay in my motorhomr

This is a lovely location. Not too busy as it's a smaller park. It feels a bit tired and the sites are not large. The location is great right by the lake and a good base to visit the area around Ulladulla.
If you like fishing both the lake and beach have many options and a small boat or kayak would be ideal for the lake.
Unfortunately I was on site 71 which has a long slope at the front of the site and with a larger van meant that I needed to use extra blocks and a couple of lifts to be able to lift the front of the van high enough to get it close to level.
Apart from this site, most of the other sites look very level. I was disappointed that I was located to what I would consider one of their less occupied sites, even though I had booked a site well in advance.
Best to call the park rather than online booking to be able to better discuss your site requirement.
Lots to do in the area and the families here are having a great time in and around the lake.
A really nice place with friendly, welcoming staff. The kids had a ball, and the overall experience was excellent. Really looking forward to next year!

My family and I had such an amazing stay at Burrill Lake. The cabins were perfect and everything was so close to the park and the kids had so much fun. Jaz & Kirra went above and beyond. Can’t wait to go back.

We love this little caravan park.  One of my favourites. Dolphin Point inlet is my happy place to drift the days away. Can always unwind from all the stress when staying here. Kirra and the team are very friendly and helpful.

We never get tired of beautiful Burrill Lake, especially staying at our favourite spot, Holiday Haven. Always something to do, spotless facilities, and amazing staff and some of the best management we’ve ever come across. Perfect for all ages, any time of year, and budget-friendly too!

We’ve been holidaying at Holiday Haven Burrill Lake for six years in a row, returning each year with three other families, and it just keeps getting better. Keira, the owner, is absolutely lovely and always makes you feel welcome. The park is consistently well looked after, clean, and thoughtfully maintained.

There’s always plenty to do from easy access to the lake for paddleboarding, to nearby bridge jumping, surfing, and fantastic road biking. We love riding to Clyde Blueberry Ice Cream, visiting Cupitt’s Winery and Wombat Brewery, and grabbing coffee at nearby cafes especially the daily vegan muffins at Rosie Oats and the best bread and treats at Lagom Bakery. Ulladulla’s local shops are also just a short drive away.

It really has it all: location, facilities, atmosphere, and activities for all ages. We wouldn’t keep coming back if it didn’t. Already looking forward to returning again for our 7th year.

Very nice location in a medium-small sized holiday park with all the facilities you may need.
We stayed in tent, the site was a big site though no shade( tree) around it which made it hot during the day.
Great park and location, had site right near the water, beautiful clean park, staff friendly and accomodating, short walk to beach would highly recommend this park

Loved my stay at the park super accommodating, kid friendly and one was lovely.
Amazing view right on the water everything just a walk away
Would recommend

We love coming to this great little park. It's very friendly and our children have grown up having holidays here and love it. Beautiful lake and breach access and the fishing excellent.  The two park managers are very approachable and do a great job. They run lots of kids activities and night cinema movies for the little ones.
Perfect location for the family. Wonderful staff. Clean park and facilities. Dog friendly which is a plus for us. Will definitely come again.

Came to Burrill lake holiday haven to purchase some holiday vouchers for our children and ended up staying  the night at the last minute as usual we were looked after by Kirra who went out of her way to help us with our purchase of the vouchers.so my wife and I just unwind for the couple of days over the weekend we used our paddle boards had a swim walked to the beach and just enjoyed the park.the only thing that needs attention is the camp kitchen maybe needs to have a few dollars spent on it so that people can really enjoy the experience of a place to meet and make new friends and meet old friends .again thanks to Kirra and her great team from myself and Leanne for a great stay holiday haven and Burrill lake see you soon.

Visit Holiday haven Burrill lake great staff Kira and Jaz are very friendly and helpful always go the extra mile to ensure that your stay is great close to beach and on the lake cafe near by and take walks along the beach or just sit back and watch the world go by great way to recharge your batteries

This is a Fantastic little park.
Very friendly, helpful staff and Managers that really care about your holiday experience.
Being a smaller park you feel a bit like family and because of the good vibes the other campers are really friendly as well.
Great lakeside swimming, fishing, kayaking and paddle boarding.
We'll definitely be back.
Thanks Guy's. 🥰

Such a great little caravan park!

The sites are spacious and well maintained, the amenities are clean and functional, there’s a great children’s playground, well equipped camp kitchen, and a lovely pool.

Nothing is too much trouble for the wonderful Managers and their helpful staff.

But, it’s the position on the edge of Burrill Lake and it’s crystal clear, aqua water that tops it off! There’s always something happening on the lake - a plethora of birdlife, people in boats or on paddle boards, in kayaks or simply swimming in the calm, safe waters. The beach is just a short walk from the caravan park, too. And then there’s the sunsets…

This is the perfect place to enjoy being on holiday whether you choose to be active or do nothing at all!
Set up, fresh oysters and a glass of wine, what else does a girl need.

Highly recommend Holiday Haven Burrill Lake, Kirra and her team never disappoint with outstanding service.

We have stayed in both cabins and powered sites and seriously love it.

You will be greeted with a pet friendly location, live entertainment events, outstanding sunset views with Pigeon House Mountain as your back drop.

Short stroll to the beach and amazing location for kayaking and paddle boarding.

Fresh Seafood & Hot Chips, Bakery, Grocery Store and coffee all at your fingertips.

Thanks Kirra and Team, yet again another sensational weekend.

We stayed for the weekend and had a great time.
The amenities were always clean, staff are super friendly and helpful and the van sites are well maintained.

We’ll be back.
What a pleasant park to stay at. Management were very inviting and willing to help with anything. Facilities were spotless. Camp kitchen was well equipped
Small clean park with older amenities. Very friendly helpful staff. Good location right on Stoney Creek. A short walk over the Sandhills to the beach.

Very close to all activities, great paddle boarding, clean amenities, friendly staff, great playground for kids. Beautiful location with great views! Nice & quiet. The camp kitchen needs to be more enclosed so protected from the weather but that’s it!! Awesome, will be back!
Nice place with wonderful helpful staff.
Our family had a little holiday there and we were absolutely thrilled with kindness, service, location, the facilities and above all the staff smiles. We are definitely going back.

Fabulous location right next to lake and short walk to the beach. Cabins are clean, well equipped, and comfortable. Nice looking pool, kids playground and visitors lounge. Staff very friendly and helpful. Just a short walk over/under the highway to The Fish Shop, Lagon Bakery and a Bottle Shop. Highly recommended 👍👍
The little cabins are very cute, neat and tidy.
Wonderful location, friendly staff, great walks on the beach and options with cabins go fishing and pet friendly
Another superb weekend at Burrill Lake. Even the dolphins were enjoying the beach.
Great customer service, very friendly and always happy to help, the park very clean and tidy.

This place rocks.
Great location
Great facilities
Great people
Would definitely recommend
This place is so beautiful and the sunsets are amazing, the staff are wonderful nothing is too hard for them . Looking forward for my next visit .

Had a wonderful weekend away with my wife and our dog Remus. The cabin was very clean comfortable and the management and staff were excellent. We had a great view of the lake and the nearby cafe was excellent as well. We can't wait to get back soon.

We stayed in a premium powered site (85)  for 3 nights over the Easter weekend. The site was clean with artificial grass and moments walk from both the lake and the amenities.  There were no big/ flies/ insects/dust.||Lake was beautiful. Was nice and warm to swim in and you could  put SUP/ kayaks in straight from caravan park. ||Beach was pretty to walk along. Note it is not  patrolled and waves were big so wouldn’t want to swim in it. ||Park was well maintained. Showers and toilets clean  at all times. Security at night added to the safety. Activities like movie nights  available for kids if they were interested. There was a teen hang out  room with you tube on the tv and a table tennis table outside. ||Lovely playground as well for younger kids. ||Although park was at capacity, it was not loud at night or early morning.||Lovely bakery across the Rd and fish and chip shop. Short drive to supermarket and many other shops like bcf and maccas 5 mins drive away.

3／30～31 2人 兩晚 power site 一個晚上40AUD
雖然這兩天遇到狂風暴雨 但還是覺得這地方很棒

Had a great stay at the park. Great location; it's great that the park is a little smaller than some, as this lends for a great atmosphere. We had the best ensuite at our site that we have ever had and the staff are top notch. Highly recommend a stay here.

We booked 4 cabins here over the Xmas holidays and had a great time. The staff and services are great. It is a small park without all the fancy stuff some of the bigger parks have, however the staff, location and amenities are great and good value for money. The manager and her staff are friendly, welcoming and attentive. The cabins are big, clean and in good condition.
Great park, awesome location. Stayed on water front site with ensuite. Amenities spotless. Hopefully we can make it back sometime.
Kirra and her team always deliver a great environment to relax.
Highly recommend this park. Great views and clean and tidy. Very well run!

We stayed at one of the cottages a few weeks ago. The cabin was fantastic and the outside area was very cosy with a beautiful view. Very clean and so many friendly souls which made the stay even better. Close walk to the ocean, fish & chips shop, bakery etc. Staff was great and so friendly and welcoming. Look forward to the next visit 😊👍.

Map easily located on website, park roads a little tight but easily navigated. Manager is lovely and understanding. Close to a nice swimming spot and walking paths. Not much noise from nearby bridge and highway.
Staff are so great! Friendly and helpful. Lovely and clean park, great amenities. Hired kayaks on the lake.  Great fun.  Pool is beautiful can't wait to go back.
What a great park , plenty of space , friendly people and great value, Magic spot on the water , a little piece of paradise we would like to say thank you for sharing it with us , Keven and Deb

We stumbled across this little gem whilst road tripping last week.
We arrived in our Winnibego with our pooch having left another location that just didn’t feel safe. On the road again, we passed by Holiday Haven over Burrell Lake and thought, let’s just see if they are still open. Having read the sign on the door, we realised we had just missed the check in time. We called to try our luck and the lovely Park Manager overhead us outside reading the sign on the door.
Greeted with a smile, and made to feel very welcome, we set up camp for the night. Having enjoyed the ease of it all, not to mention the calm surrounding and the beautiful aspect, we decided to stay another night.  We wished we could have stayed a week.
Gems are precious and rare.
Recommend!!!
Thank you to the staff. You made our day/s.

What a beautiful little park.  Set on the edge of the inlet and stunning beach. Very clean, fabulous staff (friendly and so accommodating).  Pet friendly for those wanting to bring their fur babies.  Ulladulla shops 5 mins. drive.  Wouldn't hesitate to recommend and have just rebooked our next stay.

4 days of our stay went so quick. The staff are amazing,
very friendly and very accommodating. It's walking distance to the beach and the lake view has the best sunset! Me and my cousins had an awesome time. Big shout out to kirra and the whole team, job well done for keeping the place very clean. I highly recommend this place if your travelling with kids, they have a few activities to keep them occupied during the day.

PS.  I didn't give any stars for the room because we're at the powered site.
Love this park. Clean and tidy. Staff are amazingly friendly. Great location. Easy access to the lake for fishing, swimming and SUPing.

This little gem of a van park has everything you could want for a holiday, it’s a short walk to the beach for swimming or fishing, access to the lake right at your doorstep to launch your canoe, kayak or small boat as well as clean (although slightly older) ammenities and kitchen, covered seating at the waters edge adjacent to a small stage where there is entertainment on some weekends that lends itself to that time in the afternoon usually between 4-00 and 5-00 for socialising with people who have similar interests and for sharing stories and having a few laughs in short we have absolutely enjoyed our stays there and will definitely be back.

Fantastic location and super clean amenities.
Staff very friendly and helpful, we will be visiting again.

Amazing park, stayed in a cabin for the weekend. Very relaxing atmosphere, Kids loved it, right near the water with kayaks and paddle boards to use. Very short walk to the beach, cafe, bakery, fish and chips etc.
Fantastic little park. Quiet and superb waterfronts. Dog friendly and there were plenty there, all behaved. We’ll be back. :)
Great experience for the weekend! Fantastic staff who helped with booking the right site for us. Awesome spot right on the lake and walking distance to SUP hire and the fish and chip shop.

Awesome staff so friendly kind helpful.
Waterway was beautiful in our kayak sup.
Closely bakery coffee shop
Fantastic pool park for kids.
Best japenese in ulladulla went for a bike ride on the tracks to everywhere.
Loved 😍

Awesome staff they are so helpful and happy rarely see that these days. Park was fantastic on the waterway with our kayak and supboard. Kids enjoyed the pool and park . Beach was beautiful |One of our favourites mainly because the people running it are so beautiful to us all.

Great little park, with spotless amenities, and very nice friendly staff. Easy access to the beach, and the lake. Groceries, cafe, take-a-way food, Bakery, Post Office etc, all short walk from the park. Stay in our caravan on a very generous site. Power, water.

Wow, how good is this park!
Great location, love being right on the lake with all water activities right at your doorstep, with also only a short walk to a beautiful beach, shops close by, great facilities in the park, very clean and tidy with lovely friendly staff, will definitely be back again.

We love to stay at Holiday Haven Burrill Lake. If you are looking for somewhere to stay that is right near a beautiful tidal Lake and also a  beach, this is the place to visit. We have a small boat which we can launch from the caravan park into the Lake, and we have caught Flathead and other species fishing in the Lake. When the whiting are on though we fish a lot from the beach, which is only a short walk from the park. It’s a peaceful and relaxing place for us to visit, we will definitely be back again and Kirra & team are super helpful and friendly, they always make you feel welcome.

What a lovely little park
Kirra and staff very welcoming and friendly
Cabin was very tidy and clean, loved sitting at the water front cooking dinner on the BBQ
Very relaxing friendly park ☀️

Stayed in a cabin for the last week over looking the water the weather was perfect the sunsets were amazing
Excellent friendly service by Kirra and staff, the room smelt nice and fresh cabin was very clean, grandson loved watching the pelicans on the water from the veranda
All round great stay thank you Holiday Haven highly recommended 😄

Place is outstanding. Super friendly family and staff.
Inlet is a 1min walk and area is peaceful.
Will be back for sure

We stayed at lake front ensuite tent site. Beautiful location. We loved our stay there.. even though we faced some challenges Kirra went above and beyond to make sure we are happy and we commend her for that. Great example she set of looking after customers. Staff was very helpful and welcoming and we enjoyed chats everytime we met Kirra around the park. Bathrooms for ensuite sites were very clean and spacious. We loved Kirra's tip on the way back to Sydney to avoid traffic during long weekend. Thank you so much and wish you the best..
A great small caravan park with easy access to Lake Burrell and coastline.....Great cost effective pricing
Great place to visit , good for kayaks with crystal clear water.  Nice tidy park

We absolutely loved Holiday Haven at Burril Lake. Kirra was lovely from the get the go, dog friendly cabin was perfect for a stop over would definitely stay longer and join in for a theme night they look incredible!!

We really enjoyed staying here beautiful deck overlooking the water, we spent so much time outside using the park’s facilities such as games room, playground, and watching the movies, it was a very good location right on the water and then access to the beach which we fished off as well, location was also very close to everything, staff were lovely as well and very helpful, can’t wait to come back !
Dog 🐕 friendly, great spot 👌..

Great place to stay. We had a great time here. Staff were super helpful and friendly. They offered a warm camp kitchen and fire pits which was amazing in the colder weather. $20 for unpowered site is an absolute bargain. Thanks again
Perfection.
Great friendly service, spotless accommodation and beautiful spot!

We had to do a last minute and late stop in Ulladulla, and luckily we came here :) they received us in after hour offices without any problem. Great place! Specially when you are traveling in a 4wd on a windy and cold night and needing a little bit of a shelter. Kitchen and common areas had a heater 🙌🏼
Also the staff, very kind and helpful.

We have been a few times over the years and have come to love this place |Kirra makes you feel so welcome |The cleanliness of amenities, the staff are always saying hello|We enjoy it so much we are spending more time|Handy having shop like IGA, fish shop, bakery nearby
The cabins were beautiful and clean, the staff were friendly and welcoming. The park was well looked after and maintained.

We had a great stay at Holiday Haven! The sites were a little smaller than some other places we've stayed but were in great condition and the facilities were wonderful. We had the ensuite site and the bathroom was new, bright and in perfect condition. There was plenty to do and we were right on the beach.
The staff were friendly, welcoming and helpful. Thank you for a great stay!
Kira is awesome and makes a great vibe in the campsite! Thanks for all the help and bice movie nights 🤗

Our favourite holiday destination! 2 weeks a year every year for the past 12 years. The location is amazing and the lake stunning. Staff are always great & the park itself and amenities are always clean. Short walk to the beach and shops and cafes within walking distance.  Amazing park for all ages, our kids love it! We have made some wonderful friends over the years and really look forward to returning every year. Thank you Kirra for another amazing holiday! See you next year 😊

Absolute worth every penny, The team here have been nothing but wonderful over the years, we stay here a couple of times a year with the dog and friends and never disappoints. Amenities always clean, kitchen area always spotless and kept clean, absolutely beautiful area, we always stay on the backside as it's cheaper and quiet(Tent only sites). Always a pleasure staying here. Fish n Chip shop across the road along side the bottle-o and a bakery! Not to mention there's fishing everywhere, and supermarkets arnt that far either. It's always a pleasure staying.

Such a lovely park, beautiful sunsets and sunrises, situated near the beach and faces onto a tidal lake. Great place to stay where you can go fishing, kayaking, paddle boarding or just relax beside the lake. Staff are all friendly and very accommodating. Special shout out to Kirra, see you again soon.

We were going to try a free camp spot but we’re told about this park , did not disappoint, we were after hours and the lady who answered my call was fabulous, very obligingly ( general a nice chick ) opened the office gave us a great spot , showers and toilets spotless would totally recommend
Absolutely wonderful. 😃😃

Holiday Haven Burrill Lake is our ‘go to’ holiday spot for our family. The location is central to everything but yet feels like you could be miles away. With the lake and beach at your doorstep, what more could you want. The amenities are very clean, couldn’t get the kids out of the pool, and the staff could not be more accommodating to our family. This is our second visit to this magnificent spot and we’ve already booked again same time next year.

Our favourite place to camp! Park facilities are always clean, camp kitchen area is great especially if it's bad weather and you just want to hang out. They even have a butterfly enclosure which is cool. Great spot right near Burrill Lake, heaps of seats and BBQ area down near the lake aswell. This is our third time camping here and will be back when we can.
Great small park right on the lake with a top manager leading a good team. Stay here again

Amazing value for money. Beautiful location on a sunny day. The beach 2 minutes away and the lake which you can see from the site. Staff were all really friendly and helpful. Very quiet even though there were children staying everyone had their own space. Only thing that let it down was an ant infestation in the shared kitchen and the shower facilities were not clean. One day I went in straight after the cleaner, I had to wait for him to finish cleaning so it was fresh, but still quite unclean in the shower and sinks. But I would definitely stay here again 😊
Stayed in the cottage for the week and enjoyed ourselves immensely, even though it rained badly for the first 3 days. Kirra and Jaz were lovely to deal with. Would def like to visit again.

This is our second year staying at holiday haven Burrill lake. So nice being so close to the water. The cabin is perfect. Comfy bed and double bunks for the kids. Their native garden surrounding the cabin is lush and beautiful. The bbq on the deck is our favourite, so easy to use and clean. We cooked most meals on it. So easy to walk across and pick up fresh sourdough at Lagom bakery. A local guy played live music on the beach which creating a wonderful vibe. 10/10 would recommend camping or staying at their cabins. It’s a great spot :)
Great spot access to beach and the lake short walk canoeing swimming fishing right here nice quite caravan park 😀

My family and I stayed here in cabin 10 from jan 2nd- 7th 2024.

The staff are extremely helpful and friendly, with 24 hour management on site.

This holiday park is one of the cleanest we have been to, with fully equipped amenities, including laundry , swimming pool, play equipment and bbq areas.

Our cabin was fully self contained with everything included down to the al foil and cling wrap !

Plenty to do, kids free to roam around and lots of local eateries that are a must visit.

Thank you to the staff for having us, and a special thank you to Kiera for always going above and beyond to ensure our stay was enjoyable.
Amazing location and clean facilities. Staff were extremely helpful in arranging kayak hire. Thank you, we will visit again.
Stunning location and amazing staff! The inlet is perfect for canoeing and kayaking! We will definately be coming back!!
Love this place. Relax and unwind.
Nice spot.  Amenities were alright but slightly dated

Best Place to have a holiday with the kids.. Lots of activities, safe for the kids... There is kayaking to do, swimming in the lake is safe for the kids...Friendly staff...This was our third visit there, and we will go there again.
Very close to Ullahdulla town center & a minute walk from a great takeaway seafood shop
Very good
Worth looking at it

Such a lovely, quiet park.
Our cabin was so small that you couldn’t swing a cat but it had everything we needed and was clean too.
It had a small pool area, kids playground and a rec room where you could play air hockey, table tennis, watch tv, etc.
We would absolutely return.

Wanted to express gratitude to Kirra the site manager - super laid back, friendly and helpful. Made our stay on the lake just that much better. Had an a significantly undercharged SUP and kayak on the lake. Super close to Ulladulla. Recommend CRIFT for caffination. (Very good 3/4 XF in a 6 Oz).
Great small xamp site on the water. Recomend+++

Amazing spot great facilities and couldn't find a better host.
Fishing off the beach or in the lake. Safe place for kids to swim in the lake or heated pool.
Camping, glamping, caravanning or staying in one of the cabin options its a great stay.
Drive through sites for caravans or buses, ensuite sites near the lake.
One of the most complete camp kitchens on the south coast.
Did I mention the staff are amazing.

Nice setup cabin with great views of the lake.
Cabin has everything you need with full kitchen and bbq. Comfortable rooms. A/C in lounge room area. Tv in lounge and main bedroom. Huge balcony. Large shower with good pressure and hot water. The park has its own boat ramp and swimming pool.

Loved our stay.
Reasonably priced.
Nice immaculately clean unit.
Lovely location and friendly staff
This wonderful team helped accommodate us when my dog got sick during our holiday. They were so kind & understanding. Will definately go back.
Had such an awesome time away. Thanks heaps to all the staff for being so helpful and friendly. We'll definitely be back soon.
